subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Woodson Allen, spoken on 1912-10-10
subcodes.first_line: Nothing makes a man so happy as love…. There will come a day when you will see how the nightingales of Persia will sing their songs
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @East and West; communication between East and West, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @love of God, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
